title: Describing Your Daily Routine
description: Talk about what you do every day — wake up, commute, eat, sleep.
canDo: Describe your daily schedule and ask about someone else's.
sampleDialogue: まいあさ 7じに おきます。
practicePrompts: Ask what time they wake up

lines.speaker: Host family
lines.text: まいあさ 7じに おきます。
lines.translation: Talk about what you do every day — wake up, commute, eat, sleep.

lines.speaker: Learner
lines.text: Ask what time they wake up
lines.translation: Ask what time they wake up

title: Comparing Lifestyles
description: Compare your lifestyle with someone from a different country.
canDo: Compare daily habits across cultures using simple contrast.
sampleDialogue: にほんでは おふろに はいりますが、わたしの くにでは シャワーだけです。
practicePrompts: Talk about bath vs shower culture

lines.speaker: Japanese friend
lines.text: にほんでは おふろに はいりますが、わたしの くにでは シャワーだけです。
lines.translation: Compare your lifestyle with someone from a different country.

lines.speaker: Learner
lines.text: Talk about bath vs shower culture
lines.translation: Talk about bath vs shower culture

title: Talking About the Weather
description: Discuss today's weather and make plans based on it.
canDo: Talk about the weather and adjust plans accordingly.
sampleDialogue: きょうは あめが ふりそうですね。

lines.speaker: Colleague
lines.text: きょうは あめが ふりそうですね。
lines.translation: Discuss today's weather and make plans based on it.

title: Describing Seasons
description: Talk about your favourite season and what you do during it.
canDo: Describe seasons and seasonal activities in your country.
sampleDialogue: わたしの くにの なつは とても あついです。

lines.speaker: Penpal
lines.text: わたしの くにの なつは とても あついです。
lines.translation: Talk about your favourite season and what you do during it.

title: Explaining How to Get Somewhere
description: Explain how to travel to a place using trains, buses, or walking.
canDo: Give directions using transport and time expressions.
sampleDialogue: えきから バスで 20ぷんぐらいです。
practicePrompts: Explain how to get to a famous spot
Describe the route from the station

lines.speaker: Learner
lines.text: Explain how to get to a famous spot
lines.translation: Explain how to get to a famous spot

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.text: えきから バスで 20ぷんぐらいです。
lines.translation: Explain how to travel to a place using trains, buses, or walking.

title: At a Train Station
description: Buy a ticket, ask about platforms and transfers.
canDo: Navigate a train station — buy tickets and ask for help.
sampleDialogue: しんじゅくまで いくらですか。
practicePrompts: Ask the price to a destination

lines.speaker: Learner
lines.text: Ask the price to a destination
lines.translation: Ask the price to a destination

lines.speaker: Station staff
lines.text: しんじゅくまで いくらですか。
lines.translation: Buy a ticket, ask about platforms and transfers.

title: Making a Reservation
description: Reserve a table at a restaurant or book an activity.
canDo: Make a reservation by phone or in person.
sampleDialogue: こんばん 7じに 2にん よやく おねがいします。

lines.speaker: Restaurant staff
lines.text: こんばん 7じに 2にん よやく おねがいします。
lines.translation: Reserve a table at a restaurant or book an activity.

title: Ordering and Asking About the Menu
description: Ask about ingredients, portion sizes, and make special requests.
canDo: Ask questions about menu items and make a choice.
sampleDialogue: これは なにが はいっていますか。

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: これは なにが はいっていますか。
lines.translation: Ask about ingredients, portion sizes, and make special requests.

title: At the Doctor
description: Describe symptoms and understand basic medical instructions.
canDo: Explain what hurts and understand the doctor's advice.
sampleDialogue: きのうから あたまが いたいです。

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.text: きのうから あたまが いたいです。
lines.translation: Describe symptoms and understand basic medical instructions.

title: Buying Medicine
description: Ask for medicine at a pharmacy and understand dosage instructions.
canDo: Buy medicine and understand how to take it.
sampleDialogue: かぜの くすりは ありますか。
practicePrompts: Ask how many times to take it

lines.speaker: Pharmacist
lines.text: かぜの くすりは ありますか。
lines.translation: Ask for medicine at a pharmacy and understand dosage instructions.

lines.speaker: Learner
lines.text: Ask how many times to take it
lines.translation: Ask how many times to take it

title: Explaining a Problem
description: Explain a problem to someone — lost item, broken appliance, mistake.
canDo: Describe a problem and ask for help solving it.
sampleDialogue: すみません、エアコンが こわれています。
practicePrompts: Ask when it will be fixed

lines.speaker: Building manager
lines.text: すみません、エアコンが こわれています。
lines.translation: Explain a problem to someone — lost item, broken appliance, mistake.

title: Lost and Found
description: Report something lost or ask about lost-and-found.
canDo: Describe a lost item and where you think you lost it.
sampleDialogue: くろい かばんを なくしました。
practicePrompts: Say where you last had it

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.text: くろい かばんを なくしました。
lines.translation: Report something lost or ask about lost-and-found.

lines.speaker: Learner
lines.text: Say where you last had it
lines.translation: Say where you last had it

title: Talking About Plans
description: Discuss upcoming plans — trips, events, goals.
canDo: Talk about future plans using つもり and よてい.
sampleDialogue: なつやすみに おきなわに いくつもりです。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: なつやすみに おきなわに いくつもりです。
lines.translation: Discuss upcoming plans — trips, events, goals.

title: Inviting Someone
description: Invite someone to an event and handle their response.
canDo: Invite someone, accept or decline, and arrange details.
sampleDialogue: にちようびに はなみに いきませんか。

lines.speaker: Colleague
lines.text: にちようびに はなみに いきませんか。
lines.translation: Invite someone to an event and handle their response.

title: Describing Past Experiences
description: Talk about things you've done before — travel, food, activities.
canDo: Talk about past experiences using たことがある.
sampleDialogue: ふじさんに のぼったことが ありますか。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: ふじさんに のぼったことが ありますか。
lines.translation: Talk about things you've done before — travel, food, activities.

title: Writing a Thank-You Message
titleJa: おれいの メッセージ
description: Thank someone for a gift, meal, or kind gesture in writing.
canDo: Write a short thank-you message for hospitality or a gift.
sampleDialogue: きのうは ありがとうございました。とても たのしかったです。

lines.speaker: Host
lines.text: きのうは ありがとうございました。とても たのしかったです。
lines.translation: Thank someone for a gift, meal, or kind gesture in writing.

title: Talking About Your Hometown
description: Describe your hometown — what it's famous for, what you can do there.
canDo: Describe your hometown and what makes it special.
sampleDialogue: わたしの まちは うみが きれいで ゆうめいです。
practicePrompts: Describe what your town is known for

lines.speaker: Learner
lines.text: Describe what your town is known for
lines.translation: Describe what your town is known for

lines.speaker: Japanese friend
lines.text: わたしの まちは うみが きれいで ゆうめいです。
lines.translation: Describe your hometown — what it's famous for, what you can do there.

title: Recommending a Place to Visit
titleJa: おすすめの ばしょ
description: Recommend a place to visit and explain why it's worth going.
canDo: Recommend a destination and give reasons.
sampleDialogue: きょうとに いったほうが いいですよ。おてらが すばらしいです。

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.text: きょうとに いったほうが いいですよ。おてらが すばらしいです。
lines.translation: Recommend a place to visit and explain why it's worth going.
